summary: Iteration 160: Brain/Skin/Bridge Integration - ALL BACKEND TESTS PASSED (16/16). Frontend UI verified with all key elements visible. New features: scenario-state endpoint (The Brain), visual directives for The Skin, layer metadata in Rock Hounding specimens, layer multipliers applied to rewards.

issues: Difficulty indicator shows '0' instead of difficulty level - may need to use difficulty.difficulty field instead of difficulty.level

action_items: Minor: In RockHounding.js biome card, the Difficulty display uses controller.difficulty.level but the API returns difficulty.difficulty - consider updating to use the correct field
seed_data_creation: User has resonance=14 (Ethereal layer, close to Astral at 15), harmony=0 (critical entropy)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brain/Skin/Bridge integration fully implemented. Key endpoints: GET /api/dream-realms/scenario-state (The Brain - unified scenario state with layer, difficulty, visual_directives, harmony, elements), POST /api/rock-hounding/mine-action (returns layer metadata in specimen: layer_found, layer_name, layer_multiplier), GET /api/rock-hounding/mine (includes layer with active_layer, unlocked_layers), GET /api/game-core/stats (includes layer.all_layers with 5 layers), GET /api/game-core/layer (layer state independently). Visual directives include: entropy_level, blur, grain, glitch, saturation, tint_color, fractures_active, layer_name, layer_id. Difficulty includes: difficulty (float), state (tightening/expanding/holding), description, freshness_factor, harmony_factor, challenge_count. User resonance=14 means Ethereal layer (1.3x loot, 1.2x XP). Key data-testids: layer-bar, core-stats-hud, biome-card, depth-1 through depth-5, specimen-card, layer-indicator, entropy-indicator, fl-tab-cipher, fl-tab-mastery, fl-tab-scripts.

GET /api/dream-realms/scenario-state ret.details: Returns layer, difficulty, visual_directives, harmony, harmony_cycle, dominant_element, deficient_element, loop_active, loop_iteration

Scenario state includes visual_directive.details: Returns entropy_level, blur, grain, glitch, saturation, tint_color, tint_opacity, glow_intensity, fractures_active, layer_name, layer_id

Scenario state difficulty includes all f.details: Returns difficulty (float), state, description, freshness_factor, harmony_factor, challenge_count

Scenario state layer includes multiplier.details: Returns id, name, subtitle, color, entropy, loot_multiplier, xp_multiplier, rarity_shift

POST /api/rock-hounding/mine-action retu.details: Specimen includes layer_found, layer_name, layer_multiplier fields
Response includes layer object with id, name, loot_multiplier, xp_multiplier

GET /api/rock-hounding/mine returns laye.details: Returns layer with active_layer, unlocked_layers, layer details

XP rewards multiplied by layer xp_multip.details: Rewards show XP multiplied by layer multiplier (e.g., 12 XP with 1.3x Ethereal)

Dust rewards multiplied by layer loot_mu.details: Rewards show dust multiplied by layer multiplier (e.g., 6 Dust with 1.3x Ethereal)

GET /api/game-core/stats includes layer.details: Returns layer.all_layers with 5 layers: Terrestrial, Ethereal, Astral, Void, Nexus

GET /api/game-core/layer returns layer s.details: Returns active_layer, layer details, unlocked_layers, all_layers

GET /api/forgotten-languages/daily inclu.details: Returns streak with current, best, multiplier fields

Frontend: Rock Hounding page shows Unive.details: Shows Terrestrial, Ethereal, Astral, Void, Nexus with Ethereal highlighted

Frontend: Rock Hounding biome card shows.details: Biome card shows Difficulty indicator (shows 0, may need field name fix)

Frontend: Mine action produces correct l.details: Mining shows +12 XP, +6 Dust with Ethereal 1.3x multiplier

Frontend: Forgotten Languages page still.details: Page loads with Daily Cipher, Mastery, Scripts tabs

Frontend: Dashboard Mine/Decode/Dream bu.details: Dashboard shows Mine, Decode, Dream buttons in Games section

the_brain.purpose: Unified scenario state for any game module

the_skin.purpose: Renders all visual distortions based on Brain output

soul_to_game_bridge.purpose: Universal entry point for game module rewards
